memberdef.name: CITYJSON_LIB_DEFINE_ID_WRAPPER
memberdef.initializer: class Name final { \ public: \ Name() = default; \ \ [[nodiscard]] bool valid() const noexcept { \ return detail::id_valid(raw_); \ } \ \ friend bool operator==(const Name&, const Name&) = default; \ \ private: \ explicit Name(RawName raw) : raw_(raw) {} \ \ [[nodiscard]] RawName raw() const noexcept { return raw_; } \ \ RawName raw_{}; \ \ friend class Model; \ friend class Value; \ friend class RingDraft; \ friend class SurfaceDraft; \ friend class GeometryDraft; \ }
